coin_profile.name: Bitcoin
coin_profile.description: Bitcoin is the original decentralised digital currency and the world's largest cryptocurrency by market cap. It operates on a proof-of-work blockchain with a fixed supply of 21 million coins, making it a programmatically scarce store of value. Often referred to as 'digital gold', Bitcoin is primarily used as a long-term store of value and hedge against inflation.

BTC.name: Bitcoin

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.3/10 and survivability 86.7%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket B (Store of Value): Valued on scarcity and monetary premium. Monetary Premium measures share of gold market cap captured. Production Cost Floor provides a PoW mining-cost floor (×2 premium). Supply Adjusted Value penalises tokens with significant unlocked supply. Network Activity (NVT) treats volume as monetary circulation velocity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

BTC.iv_method: Monetary Premium, Production Cost Floor, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark

bull_points: Has captured 6.8% of gold's market cap — significant monetary adoption as a store of value
Full gold parity would imply a price of $1,049,840 — 1372% above current price
Trading at 2.0x estimated production cost — a healthy premium that incentivises miners without being excessive
bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets
Regulatory uncertainty across major markets presents an ongoing risk
Competition from newer protocols could erode Bitcoin's market position over time

cost_of_production.note: Production cost is an industry estimate, not an exact figure

coin_profile.name: BNB
coin_profile.description: BNB is the native token of the BNB Chain (formerly Binance Smart Chain) and the Binance exchange ecosystem. It offers reduced trading fees on Binance, powers the BNB Chain network, and undergoes quarterly token burns. BNB benefits from Binance's position as the world's largest cryptocurrency exchange.

BNB.name: BNB

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 6.3/10 and survivability 70.0%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

BNB.iv_method: Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, Dilution Adjustment

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain data available — protocol has an established track record of fee generation across market cycles

bear_points: Crypto market volatility remains high — macro conditions could impact all digital assets

coin_profile.name: Bitcoin Cash
coin_profile.description: Bitcoin Cash is a Bitcoin fork created in 2017 to increase block size and enable cheaper on-chain payments. It prioritises low-fee peer-to-peer transactions over store of value.

BCH.name: Bitcoin Cash

forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.
